title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Insists Cease-Fire Holds Despite Exchange of Fire
summary_full: The United States said it had attacked Iranian military targets in response to strikes on American ships. Washington and Tehran are debating a peace proposal, Iranian officials said.
summary_public: The United States said it had attacked Iranian military targets in response to strikes on American ships. Washington and Tehran are debating a peace proposal, Iranian officials said.
